    A

    AppColor - Class in adrover.antiads.use
    Utility class that defines the color palette used throughout the application.
    applyTheme(boolean) - Method in class adrover.antiads.login.LoginPanel
    Applies the selected theme to the login panel.
    applyTheme(boolean) - Method in class adrover.antiads.panels.DetailsPanel
    Applies light or dark theme colors to the panel.
    applyTheme(boolean) - Method in class adrover.antiads.panels.EditPanel
    Applies the selected visual theme to the panel.

    clearSavedAuth() - Method in class adrover.antiads.login.LoginPanel
    Clears all saved authentication data.

    D

    DARK_BG - Static variable in class adrover.antiads.use.AppColor
    Background color used in dark mode.
    DARK_BUTTON - Static variable in class adrover.antiads.use.AppColor
    Button background color used in dark mode.
    DARK_PANEL - Static variable in class adrover.antiads.use.AppColor
    Panel background color used in dark mode.
    DARK_TEXT - Static variable in class adrover.antiads.use.AppColor
    Text color used in dark mode.
    DetailsPanel - Class in adrover.antiads.panels
    Panel that displays detailed information about local and network media files.
    DetailsPanel(MediaComponent, boolean) - Constructor for class adrover.antiads.panels.DetailsPanel
    Creates a new DetailsPanel.
    DetailsPanel.MediaItem - Class in adrover.antiads.panels
    Represents a media file (local, network or both).
    DetailsPanel.MediaItem.State - Enum Class in adrover.antiads.panels

    Loads all available media from the local download folder and the remote API.
